summary: Tested Unified Settings Manager with 4 tabs. Fixed critical bug: site-images router was missing prefix causing 404 errors. All tabs now working correctly.

issues: Non-critical React warning about non-boolean attribute 'jsx' - cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: site_images_router was included without prefix - added prefix='/site-images' to server.py
FIXED: Duplicate 'case settings:' in AdminDashboard.jsx switch statement (dead code removed)
FIXED: Removed unused imports from AdminDashboard.jsx (SiteSettingsManager, SiteImagesManager, MediaLibraryManager, BBQSettingsManager, BBQProductsManager)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Settings Manager is fully functional with 4 tabs: Media Library, Site Images, Menu & CTAs, General Settings. All tabs load correctly. Site-images API endpoints now work at /api/site-images/* after adding router prefix.

unified_settings_tabs.media_library: PASS - Tab loads, shows stats and upload functionality
unified_settings_tabs.site_images: PASS - Tab loads, shows 8 image slots for website customization
unified_settings_tabs.menu_ctas: PASS - Tab loads, shows Header Navigation, Hero CTAs, Footer Links sections
unified_settings_tabs.general_settings: PASS - Tab loads, shows Website Content Management form

tests_performed.tab_switching: PASS - All 4 tabs switch correctly without errors
tests_performed.admin_login: PASS - Login with admin credentials works
tests_performed.sidebar_menu: PASS - Settings & Media menu item visible and clickable

bugs_fixed.issue: Site Images tab showing 404 errors for /api/site-images/slots
bugs_fixed.root_cause: site_images_router was included in api_router without a prefix
Dead code - second case would never execute
bugs_fixed.fix: Removed duplicate case and unused imports
